description:
The final removal. `compute_survivors` in main.rs (line 80-92) is a third independent derivation of "what's reachable post-reduction" — duplicating the typer's analysis. Replace it with a read of `module.reachable_specs` from .6.

## Steps

1. Delete `compute_survivors` from src/main.rs.
2. Update `validate_specs_or_exit` (and any other callers) to read `module.reachable_specs` directly.
3. pattern_check::check_program's `survivors: Option<&HashSet<(String, usize)>>` parameter: either pass `&reachable_specs` (after a name/arity → SpecKey reconciliation) or change the parameter shape to take SpecKeys directly.
4. Consider whether `prelude_fn_id_cutoff` can also go now that `FnIr.category == Prelude` carries the same information cleanly.

## Verify

- pattern_check warnings byte-identical on every fixture.
- No new false-positives or missing warnings on `list_primitives` etc.
- Module's view of "what's reachable" is now sourced from exactly one place.

## Blocked by

fz-f88.6
title: fz-RS.8 — Delete compute_survivors; route pattern_check through module reachability
